words.example_english: How much grass does a buffalo eat per day?

words.example_italian: Tom è andato dritto a letto.
words.example_english: Tom went straight to bed.

words.example_italian: La nave arriverà in porto domattina.
words.example_english: The ship is arriving in harbor tomorrow morning.

words.example_italian: Amo la mia famiglia tantissimo.
words.example_english: I love my family so much.

words.example_italian: Il termine non mi è familiare.
words.example_english: The word is unfamiliar to me.

words.example_italian: Da dove sta venendo la luce?
words.example_english: Where is the light coming from?

words.example_italian: Lui mi ha spiegato la regola.
words.example_english: He explained the rule to me.

words.example_italian: Il mondo è pieno di pazzi.
words.example_english: The world is full of fools.

words.example_italian: Ci sorrise e salì sul treno.
words.example_english: He smiled at us and got on the train.

words.example_italian: Tom era coinvolto nel suo lavoro.
words.example_english: Tom was very much involved in his work.

words.example_italian: La prova è lasciata al lettore.
words.example_english: The proof is left to the reader.

words.example_italian: State attenti a non cadere.
words.example_english: Take care lest you should fall.

words.example_italian: Uno di loro è una spia.
words.example_english: One of them is a spy.

words.example_italian: Tom ha venduto la sua azienda.
words.example_english: Tom sold his company.

words.example_italian: Tom ora è in vacanza, vero?
words.example_english: Tom is now on vacation, isn't he?

words.example_italian: Lei ci manda delle e-mail.
words.example_english: She sends us e-mails.

words.example_italian: Io ho tre figlie da sposare.
words.example_english: I have three daughters to marry off.

words.example_italian: Le dica di lasciarmi da solo.
words.example_english: Tell her to leave me alone.

words.example_italian: Mi ha invitato a casa sua.
words.example_english: She invited me to her home.

words.example_italian: Mi gira un po' la testa.
words.example_english: I'm feeling kind of dizzy.

words.example_italian: Lui non ha la sua medicina.
words.example_english: He doesn't have his medication.

words.example_italian: Io spero che voi abbiate fame.
words.example_english: I hope you're hungry.

words.example_italian: Lisa mi disse che aveva provato il natto.
words.example_english: Lisa told me that she had tried natto.

words.example_italian: Il sole sorge sempre ad est.
words.example_english: The sun always rises in the east.

words.example_italian: Questo libro è così figo.
words.example_english: This book is so cool.

words.example_italian: Lui sa molte cose sugli animali.
words.example_english: He knows a lot about animals.

words.example_italian: Io ho il mal di testa.
words.example_english: I have a headache.

words.example_italian: Si è imbattuta in un lupo.
words.example_english: She came across a wolf.

words.example_italian: La vittoria lo rese un eroe.
words.example_english: The victory made him a hero.

words.example_italian: Tom va dappertutto per conto suo.
words.example_english: Tom goes everywhere by himself.

words.example_italian: I tuoi servizi sono apprezzati.
words.example_english: Your services are appreciated.

words.example_italian: In una parola, è assurdo.
words.example_english: In a word, it's ridiculous.

words.example_italian: Tom ci ha guardati con attenzione.
words.example_english: Tom watched us carefully.

words.example_italian: Sai se domani potrà venire da noi?
words.example_english: Do you know if he can come to us tomorrow?

words.example_italian: Non lo so quanto ci vorrà.
words.example_english: I don't know how long it'll take.

words.example_italian: Tom ha accolto i suoi ospiti.
words.example_english: Tom greeted his guests.

words.example_italian: Tom non è bravo a mentire.
words.example_english: Tom isn't good at lying.

words.example_italian: Una pietra lo colpì in testa.
words.example_english: A stone hit him on the head.

words.example_italian: Il freno ha smesso di funzionare.
words.example_english: The brake stopped working.

words.example_italian: Tom ha diverse migliaia di libri.
words.example_english: Tom has several thousand books.

words.example_italian: Io presi la palla al volo.
words.example_english: I caught the ball.

words.example_italian: Tom si è offerto di pagare.
words.example_english: Tom offered to pay.

words.example_italian: A me piace suonare il piano.
words.example_english: I like playing the piano.
